/// The `feature/` directory is a Mason brick template output directory.
/// New features generated by the `feature` brick will be placed here.
///
/// Run the following command to scaffold a new feature:
///   mason make feature --name my_feature
///
/// Each generated feature follows a consistent structure:
///   feature/
///   └── my_feature/
///       ├── cubit/
///       │   ├── my_feature_cubit.dart
///       │   └── my_feature_state.dart
///       └── my_feature_page.dart

// This file exists to preserve the directory in version control.
